prompt: Safari is open on https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/macOS (Chinese Wikipedia, macOS article). Use the translate button in the URL bar (or the View menu > Translate to English) to translate the page to English. If translation isn't available on this system, instead write 'translation not available' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/118-translate-confirm.txt. If you do translate, write 'translated to English' to that same file.
